name: Sonmez Filament Sentetik Iplik ve Elyaf Sanayi A.S.
summary: S√É¬∂nmez Filament Sentetik Iplik ve Elyaf Sanayi A.S. manufactures and sells yarns and fibers in Turkey. It offers poy, flat, uniform, twisted, and painted yarns for the automotive industry, as well as high flap yarns. The company also leases properties. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Bursa, Turkey.
